# B5 Homes Greenville

> Premium vacation rental home nestled in a private forest in Greenville, South Carolina.

B5 Homes is a 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom vacation rental on 35,000 sq ft of private woodland, just 15 minutes from downtown Greenville, SC. The property offers a unique forest retreat experience with modern amenities and warm hospitality. Superhost rated on Airbnb with 5-star reviews.

## Property Details

- **Type**: Entire home — vacation rental
- **Location**: 5 Oak Glen Ct, Greenville, SC 29607
- **Bedrooms**: 3 (master with ensuite, two guest bedrooms)
- **Bathrooms**: 2
- **Lot Size**: 35,000 sq ft private woodland
- **Distance to Downtown**: 15 minutes
- **Distance to Falls Park**: 15 minutes
- **Superhost**: Yes
- **Rating**: 5.0 / 5.0

## Amenities

- Free Wi-Fi
- Free parking
- Fully equipped kitchen (Keurig, blender, toaster, full cookware)
- Washer and dryer
- Screened porch with woodland views
- Dedicated workspace
- Playground with swing set
- Smart TV
- Central heating and air conditioning
- Premium linens and towels

## Check-in / Check-out

- **Check-in**: 3:00 PM
- **Check-out**: 11:00 AM

## Booking

- Book on Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.de/h/b5homes
- Book on VRBO: https://www.vrbo.com/2120967

## Contact

- Email: booking@b5homes.com
- Website: https://b5homes.com

## Nearby Attractions

- Falls Park on the Reedy (15 min) — iconic suspension bridge and waterfall
- Downtown Greenville Main Street (15 min) — restaurants, shops, nightlife
- Swamp Rabbit Trail — 22-mile walking and biking trail
- Paris Mountain State Park (20 min) — hiking and swimming
- Greenville-Spartanburg International Airport (25 min)
- BMW Performance Center (30 min)
- Caesars Head State Park (45 min) — Blue Ridge Mountain views
